hooks.command: MEMORY=$(cat contracts/claude-session-memory.json | jq -c '{schemaVersion,contractId,lastUpdated,lastOptimized,currentState,versioningRules,deployFlow,gitPatterns,ciPatterns,commonPatterns,optimizations,contextSeparation:{goldenRules:.contextSeparation.goldenRules},multiCompanyModel:{description:.multiCompanyModel.description,goldenRules:.multiCompanyModel.goldenRules,companies:{getronics:{workspaceId:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.workspaceId,status:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.status,tokenSecret:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.tokenSecret,repos:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.repos,repoDetails:(.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.repoDetails|map_values({role,currentVersion,ci}))},cit:{workspaceId:.multiCompanyModel.companies.cit.workspaceId,status:.multiCompanyModel.companies.cit.status}}},workspaceSeparationAudit:.multiCompanyModel.workspaceSeparationAudit}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); PENDING=$(cat contracts/pending-tasks.json 2>/dev/null || echo '[]'); echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"'"$MEMORY"'","pendingTasks":"'"$PENDING"'"}}'
echo '{"systemMessage":"REMEMBER: Before compacting, ensure contracts/claude-session-memory.json has been updated with any new decisions, patterns, or lessons learned during this session."}'
echo '{"systemMessage":"SESSION END REMINDER: Update contracts/claude-session-memory.json with new learnings, commit, and push before closing."}'
